body.title: Agenda IETF125: ippm
Chat Log IETF125: ippm: Thu 09:00
Polls IETF125: ippm: Thu 09:00
1. Chairs Slides
2. A YANG Data Model for In Situ Operations, Administration, and Maintenance (IOAM) Integrity Protected Options
3. The Updates on the Benchmarking Methodology for Intra-domain  and Inter-domain Source Address Validation
4. Update of the STAMP CoS Extension for ECN
5. Updates to Characterization and Benchmarking Methodology for Power in Networking Devices
6. STAMP Extensions for Reflecting STAMP Packet IP Headers
7. Simple Two-Way Active Measurement Protocol (STAMP) Extensions for Residual Bit Error Rate Measurement
8. AltMark and On-Path Telemetry drafts
9. IOAM Direct Exporting (DEX) Option Extensions for Incorporating the Alternate- Marking Method
10. IOAM Trace Option Extensions for Incorporating the Alternate-Marking Method
11. Benchmarking for AI fabrics (terminology - training - inference)
12. Benchmarking Methodology for Route Origin Validation (ROV)
13. draft-li-ippm-ioam-packet-triggered-reporting
14. IP measurement options; Enabling passive network measurements with minimal additional data and efforts.
15. Feedback on IPPMBMWG Joint Session
